violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be drained and sanitized end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
The drainage from the ice machine unit is draining into the hand sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
